header.title: Find Your Perfect Rental
header.subtitle: Search thousands of properties with honest reviews from real renters

disclaimer.title: Unverified Property:
disclaimer.message: This property was submitted by a community member and has not been verified by the landlord. Information may be inaccurate.

messages.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search criteria or browse all properties
messages.errorHint: Please check your connection and try again

propertyDetails.unverifiedWarning1: This property listing was submitted by a community member, not by the landlord.
propertyDetails.unverifiedWarning2: Details such as rent, bedrooms, and amenities may be inaccurate.
propertyDetails.unverifiedWarning3: We do not guarantee the accuracy of this listing.
propertyDetails.unverifiedWarning4: Contact the landlord directly to verify all information.
propertyDetails.noReviewsMessage: No reviews yet. Be the first to review this property!

reviewWarning.title: Reviewing an Unverified Property
reviewWarning.subtitle: This property has not been verified by its landlord.
reviewWarning.warning1: Property details may be inaccurate or outdated.
reviewWarning.warning2: The landlord may not be aware this listing exists.
reviewWarning.warning3: Your review will be marked as being for an unverified property.
reviewWarning.warning4: You can still leave an honest review based on your experience.
reviewWarning.confirmationText: By continuing, you acknowledge that this is an unverified property listing and that your review will reflect your personal experience.

claimModal.title: Claim This Property
claimModal.subtitle: Verify that you are the landlord for this property
claimModal.verificationPlaceholder: Explain how you can verify ownership (deed, tax records, property management agreement, etc.)
claimModal.legalConfirmation: I confirm that I am the legal owner or authorized representative of this property and that the information I provide is accurate and truthful.

claimSuccess.title: Claim Submitted!
claimSuccess.message: Your property claim has been submitted for review. Our team will verify your documentation and contact you within 2–3 business days.
claimSuccess.nextStepsMessage: Complete your landlord verification to expedite the claim process.
